title: Time-of-Day Execution Gate (Open/Close Avoidance Window)
summary: Add a configurable time-of-day filter that suppresses new order entry during the opening volatility window (default 9:30–9:40 ET) and optionally the closing window (3:55–4:00 ET). Signals can still be generated and queued but orders are not submitted until the gate opens. This is backed by well-documented intraday volume and spread patterns where opening 15 minutes carry the highest intraday risk, widest spreads, and most misleading price action.
expected_impact: Eliminates wide-spread fills during market open chaos; empirical intraday research shows spreads are widest in first 5–15 minutes and last 5 minutes; avoiding these windows reduces adverse selection risk and prevents the most erratic fills
